title: poa arctica
intro: Poa arctica, also known as Arctic Bluegrass, is a type of grass that grows in the Arctic tundra regions of the world, typically found in areas with permafrost. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Poa arctica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Poa arctica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
